title: Coming Through The Rye.
content:
Tune - "Coming through the rye."


I.

        Coming through the rye, poor body,
            Coming through the rye,
        She draiglet a' her petticoatie,
            Coming through the rye.
        Jenny's a' wat, poor body,
            Jenny's seldom dry;
        She draiglet a' her petticoatie,
            Coming through the rye.

II.

        Gin a body meet a body
            Coming through the rye,
        Gin a body kiss a body
            Need a body cry?

III.

        Gin a body meet a body
            Coming through the glen,
        Gin a body kiss a body
            Need the world ken?
        Jenny's a' wat, poor body;
            Jenny's seldom dry;
        She draiglet a' her petticoatie,
            Coming through the rye.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "Coming Through The Rye."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
